changeSet.author: mironov.rs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE task_assignment ( assignment_id BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, role_in_task VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, assignment_date DATE NOT NULL, employee_id BIGINT NOT NULL, task_id BIGINT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_assignment_employee FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee(employee_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT FK_assignment_task FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES task(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
